skill.name: fal-generate
skill.description: Generate images and videos using fal.ai AI models
skill.summary: Create AI-generated visual content using fal.ai models directly within Claude Code workflows
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All static analysis findings were determined to be false positives. The skill consists solely of documentation markdown describing fal.ai image and video generation capabilities. No executable code, network requests, or cryptographic operations are present in the skill files.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URL - Documentation Reference
low_findings.description: Static analyzer detected URLs in documentation metadata. These are reference links to source repositories, not executable network code. No security risk.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: URLs are clearly documentation references in markdown format, not code that makes network requests.

content.user_title: Generate images and videos with fal.ai AI models
content.value_statement: Creative workflows require fast, high-quality visual content generation. This skill enables seamless integration of fal.ai models to transform text prompts into images and videos.
actual_capabilities: Generate images from text descriptions using fal.ai models
Create short videos from text prompts
Access multiple fal.ai model options for different visual styles
Integrate AI image generation into Claude Code workflows
limitations: Requires active fal.ai API access and authentication
Cannot edit or modify existing images
Video generation may have length and quality constraints
Does not support audio generation or editing

use_cases.title: Rapid Visual Prototyping
use_cases.description: Generate concept art and mockups quickly during design iterations without needing manual creation tools.

use_cases.title: Social Media Content Creation
use_cases.description: Create engaging visual content for posts, stories, and marketing materials from written descriptions.

use_cases.title: AI Model Testing and Evaluation
use_cases.description: Test different fal.ai models and compare outputs before integrating into production applications.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Image Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an image of [describe your subject and scene] using fal.ai with [style, e.g., realistic, artistic, cartoon] style.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick image creation from simple descriptions

prompt_templates.title: Detailed Scene Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a high-quality image featuring [main subject] in [setting/environment] with [lighting conditions], [mood/atmosphere], rendered in [art style] style, [resolution/details].
prompt_templates.scenario: Professional-grade image with specific visual requirements

prompt_templates.title: Short Video Creation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a [duration] second video showing [action or scene description] with [camera movement] and [visual style] aesthetics using fal.ai video models.
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating animated or video content from text

prompt_templates.title: Iterative Design Exploration
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate [number] variations of [concept] exploring different [style elements: colors, compositions, lighting approaches] to compare visual directions.

output_examples.input: Generate a sunset landscape with mountains and a lake reflection
output_examples.output: A high-resolution image featuring a vibrant sunset sky with orange and purple hues, silhouetted mountain ranges in the background, and calm lake waters reflecting the colorful sky and peaks.

output_examples.input: Create a cyberpunk street scene at night with neon signs
output_examples.output: A detailed urban night scene showing rain-slicked streets, glowing neon signage in multiple languages, futuristic architecture, and atmospheric fog with dramatic lighting contrasts.

best_practices: Write detailed, specific prompts describing subject, style, lighting, and composition for best results
Review fal.ai model documentation to select the most appropriate model for your use case
Generate multiple variations and iterate on prompts to refine outputs toward your vision
anti_patterns: Do not use vague or overly brief prompts that leave too much to interpretation
Avoid requesting copyrighted characters, trademarks, or protected intellectual property
Do not generate content that violates fal.ai usage policies or ethical guidelines

faq.question: Do I need a fal.ai account to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need an active fal.ai account with API access credentials configured for your environment.

faq.question: What types of images can I generate?
faq.answer: You can generate a wide variety of images including landscapes, portraits, abstract art, product mockups, and more depending on the fal.ai models available.

faq.question: Are there usage limits or costs?
faq.answer: fal.ai operates on a credit or usage-based pricing model. Check your fal.ai dashboard for current rates and remaining credits.

faq.question: Can I specify exact image dimensions?
faq.answer: Most fal.ai models support aspect ratio specifications. Check model documentation for supported resolution options.

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Video generation typically takes longer than image generation, ranging from seconds to minutes depending on length, resolution, and model complexity.

faq.question: Can I edit generated images after creation?
faq.answer: This skill focuses on generation only. For editing, consider using image editing tools or fal.ai features that support image-to-image workflows.
